name: Ryan Baumann

intro: I lead Developer Experience Engineering and product work across tools, evals, open source, and the workflows where builders make decisions.
headline: The best developer experience ends in working code.
description: Ryan Baumann leads Developer Experience Engineering and product work for builder platforms, with a focus on developer tools, evals, open source, and AI coding agents.
categoryDefinition: Developer experience is the product, tools, documentation, and feedback loop that help builders reach a working result.
aboutTeaser: I lead Developer Experience Engineering and product work, and stay close to the code by reviewing traces, writing evals, and shipping reference apps.

sectionIntros.work: Shipped tools, open-source libraries, and product experiments, with the problem and result behind each one.
sectionIntros.writing: Notes on builder platforms, AI coding agents, evals, open source, and the developer workflows behind them.
sectionIntros.talks: Demo-first talks about developer tools, AI-assisted development, and the checks that make generated code more reliable.
sectionIntros.demos: Working demos built with real APIs, real constraints, and public source.

positioning: Developer Experience Engineering, product, and AI coding agents.
answerEngineSummary: Ryan Baumann is a Developer Experience Engineering and product lead who builds tools, evals, open-source libraries, and workflows for developers and AI coding agents. His current work at Google Maps Platform includes Code Assist, agent skills, and an agentic eval suite.
